onboarding.jours_blancs: ⚪ FASTING ALERT: We are entering the White Days period (13th, 14th, 15th of the Hijri month).
onboarding.nawafil_ok: • ✅ Voluntary Prayers (Nawafil) completed. May Allah strengthen your devotion.
onboarding.nawafil_ko:
• 🔴 NAWAFIL REMINDER: You have not logged any voluntary prayers today.
     👉 Consider performing Rawatib to compensate for any flaws in Farâ'idh.
onboarding.sadaqah_ok: • ✅ Private Charity (Sadaqah) logged today. Your social purity is active.
onboarding.sadaqah_ko:
• 🔴 SADAQAH REMINDER: No voluntary charity has been recorded for this day.
     👉 'Charity extinguishes sins just as water extinguishes fire'. Give even a little.
onboarding.hadj_ok: 🕋 HAJJ COMPLETED: Congratulations! You have honored your lifetime obligation. Think about sponsoring a relative or a needy brother.
onboarding.hadj_ko: 🕋 HAJJ ELIGIBILITY: Your savings ({:.0f} {}) fulfill the material requirement (Al-Istita'ah) for Hajj.
onboarding.tabaski: 🐑 UDHIYAH: The sacrifice of Eid El-Adha is highly recommended for your household based on your net assets.
onboarding.anniversaire_alerte:
⚠️ CRITICAL DOCTRINAL REMINDER: Today is your birthday.
   👉 Sharia Ruling: Celebrating birthdays is an unauthorized innovation (Bid'ah) according to the consensus of the 4 Fiqh schools. Use this day to ponder upon your passing life instead of innovating.
onboarding.age_islamique: 🎂 TIME & EXISTENCE: According to the Hijri lunar calendar, your exact age is: {:.1f} years.
onboarding.fin_muharram:
📌 CHRONOLOGY: We are reaching the end of the sacred month of MUHARRAM.
👉 Recommendation: Maximize your prayers and prepare for the upcoming month of Safar.
onboarding.general_devotion:
📖 DAILY MEDITATION:
   • Quran: Dedicate time today to read and ponder over a few verses.
   • Adhkar: Remember to recite your morning and evening protection supplications.
   • Manners: Guard your tongue, show kindness to parents, and maintain family ties.

encyclopedie.consigne: Select a functional module to audit its foundations (Quran, Hadith, Fiqh):

categories.texte:
✨ PIECE A: QURANIC FOUNDATION (Surah An-Nissa, v.11)
Sharia enforces the absolute priority of debt settlement before any distribution: '...after payment of legacies he may have bequeathed or debts.'

✨ PIECE B: AUTHENTIC HADITH (Al-Bukhari No.2289)
A deceased man who owed debts was brought to the Prophet ﷺ. He asked: 'Has he left any debts?' They said: 'Yes, three dinars.' He said: 'Pray for your companion (I will not pray for him).' Until a companion guaranteed the payment.

✨ PIECE C: FIQH OF THE 4 SCHOOLS (SUNNI)
• Liabilities: Absolute priority over inheritance and bequests. In Maliki and Hanbali schools, outstanding debts reduce the Zakat taxable asset baseline.
• Receivable Debts: In the Hanafi school, Zakat must be paid yearly if the debtor is solvent. The Maliki school requires payment only once upon actual recovery.

✨ PIECE A: QURANIC FOUNDATION (Surah At-Tawbah, v.34 & Surah Al-An'am, v.141)
• Finances: 'And those who hoard gold and silver... give them tidings of a painful punishment.'
• Agriculture: 'And give its due [Zakat] on the day of its harvest.'

✨ PIECE B: AUTHENTIC HADITH (Muslim No.981 / Al-Bukhari No.1454)
• Wealth Nisab: 20 gold dinars or 200 silver dirhams (2.5% flat rate).
• Agricultural Nisab: Set at 5 Wasaqs (653 kg). 10% rate for rain-fed crops, 5% for artificial irrigation systems.
• Livestock Nisab: Sheep/Goats from 40 heads (1 sheep due). Cattle from 30 heads (1 one-year-old bovine - Taby due).

✨ PIECE C: FIQH OF THE 4 SCHOOLS (SUNNI)
Unanimous consensus on agricultural and pastoral thresholds. Regarding women's gold jewelry, the Hanafi school considers it mandatory for Zakat, while Maliki, Shafi'i, and Hanbali schools exempt it if kept for lawful personal use.

✨ PIECE A: QURANIC FOUNDATION (Surah An-Nissa, v.11)
'Allah commands you concerning your children: for the male, what is equal to the share of two females.'

✨ PIECE B: AUTHENTIC HADITH (Al-Bukhari No.6732 / Muslim No.1615)
The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Give the fixed shares (Fara'idh) to those who are entitled to them. Whatever remains goes to the closest male relative.'

✨ PIECE C: FIQH OF THE 4 SCHOOLS (SUNNI)
Absolute consensus among the four schools of law regarding the 2:1 male-to-female ratio. This financial balance is legally compensated by the continuous obligation of maintenance (Nafaqah) which falls solely on men. Women retain their entire inheritance as private wealth with zero obligation to spend on the household.

✨ PIECE A: QURANIC FOUNDATION (Surah Al-Baqarah, v.180 & Surah An-Nissa, v.12/176)
• Last Will: 'Prescribed for you when death approaches any one of you... is making a bequest.'
• Kalalah: 'If a man or woman leaves property but has neither descendants nor ascendants (Kalalah)...'

✨ PIECE B: AUTHENTIC HADITH (Al-Bukhari No.2744 / Companions Consensus)
• Wasiyya: The Prophet ﷺ said to Sa'd: 'One-third, and one-third is yet a lot.' Making a bequest to a legal heir is strictly prohibited.
• Kalalah: Caliph Abu Bakr As-Siddiq defined Kalalah as a deceased person leaving neither children nor a living father.

✨ PIECE C: FIQH OF THE 4 SCHOOLS (SUNNI)
Unanimous consensus: The Wasiyya is capped at a maximum of 1/3 of the net wealth after clearing debts. In Kalalah cases, uterine siblings (mother's side) bypass the double ratio rule and inherit strictly equal shares between males and females.

✨ PIECE A: QURANIC FOUNDATION (Surah Al-Hashr, v.18)
'O you who have believed! Fear Allah. And let every soul look to what it has sent forth for tomorrow.'

✨ PIECE B: AUTHENTIC HADITH (Al-Tirmidhi No.761 / Muslim No.728)
• White Days: The Prophet ﷺ said: 'If you fast three days of the month, fast on the 13th, 14th, and 15th.'
• Nawafil: The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever prays twelve voluntary Rak'ahs every day, Allah will build a house for him in Paradise.'

✨ PIECE C: FIQH OF THE 4 SCHOOLS (SUNNI)
Consensus among all four schools on the highly recommended nature (Sunnah Mu'akkadah) of rawatib prayers and fasting on the White Days as primary tools for spiritual purification and time management.
